user.title: Set up VK Notify
user.description:
Enter your VK community bot token.

[Documentation]({docs_url})

data_description.access_token: VK community bot token with Messages permission
data_description.name: Friendly name for this notification entity

select_mode.title: Connection mode
select_mode.description: Choose how the integration connects to VK.

select_chat.title: Select chat
select_chat.description:
Select the chat to send notifications to.

If the desired chat is not in the list, the recipient must first send a message to the community.

reconfigure.title: Change chat
reconfigure.description: Select a new chat to send notifications to.

error.invalid_token: Invalid access token or API error. Please check your token.
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to VK API.
error.no_conversations: No conversations found. Make sure the bot has at least one conversation.
error.group_id_required: Could not detect community ID from the token. Make sure the token belongs to a community.
error.longpoll_no_access: The token does not have permission to use Long Poll. Re-generate the community token with 'Community management' permission enabled.
error.chat_not_writable: The bot cannot send messages to this chat. Select a different chat.

abort.already_configured: This VK Notify instance is already configured.

options.longpoll: Long Poll — send and receive incoming messages as HA events

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: VK Notify entity to send through.

url.name: URL
url.description: URL of the photo to send. Mutually exclusive with file.

file.name: File
file.description: Local file path of the photo. The path must be listed in allowlist_external_dirs. Mutually exclusive with url.
